channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network King Prism 动画 Gets 新作 Tri-Star Act Film
item.description: Story set during "Prism.3" competition for Prism Show trios ― The "King of Prism Super Live Prism☆Tours!" event announced on Sunday that production has begun on King of Prism -Tri-Star Act-, a... | 来源: ANN | 原文: King of Prism Anime Gets New Tri-Star Act Film
